mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( user_id, place_id, content, visit_date, visibility, status, like_count ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{placeId}, #{content}, #{visitDate}, #{visibility}, 'ACTIVE', 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.place_id, p.name AS place_name, r.user_id, u.nickname, r.content, r.visit_date, r.visibility, r.like_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.place_id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT review_image_id, image_url, sort_order FROM review_image WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, review_image_id ASC

SELECT review_id, user_id, place_id, content, visit_date, visibility, status, like_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM review WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET content = #{content}, visit_date = #{visitDate}, visibility = #{visibility} WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, u.nickname, r.content, r.like_count, r.created_at, image_agg.image_urls_csv FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT review_id, GROUP_CONCAT(image_url ORDER BY sort_order ASC, review_image_id ASC SEPARATOR ',') AS image_urls_csv FROM review_image GROUP BY review_id ) image_agg ON r.review_id = image_agg.review_id WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.visibility = 'PUBLIC' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.visibility = 'PUBLIC'

SELECT r.review_id, p.name AS place_name, u.nickname, r.content, r.like_count, r.created_at, image_agg.image_urls_csv FROM review r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.place_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT review_id, GROUP_CONCAT(image_url ORDER BY sort_order ASC, review_image_id ASC SEPARATOR ',') AS image_urls_csv FROM review_image GROUP BY review_id ) image_agg ON r.review_id = image_agg.review_id WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.place_id WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM review WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE review SET like_count = CASE WHEN like_count > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
